description: Versatile fine-tune for fantasy, portraits and realism

model._hint: Fine-tune: Lykon/dreamshaper-8 (SD 1.5 base). V8 improves LoRA support and NSFW vs v7. Includes its own VAE — no external VAE needed. Best scheduler: DEISMultistepScheduler. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 25 steps recommended per model card (DEISMultistepScheduler). Range: 20–30. | CFG 5–10 works well. 7.5 is the default. Higher values increase contrast and prompt adherence. | SD 1.5 native 512×512. DreamShaper v8 handles up to 768×768 without major artifacts.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates versatile illustrations covering fantasy scenes, stylised portraits, and photorealistic images. Excels at dreamlike and artistic interpretations — good all-rounder for creative prompts.
notes.prompt_guide:
No trigger word. Use descriptive prompts with art style modifiers. Examples: 'fantasy portrait of an elf warrior, detailed armour, soft light', 'a cyberpunk alley at night, neon reflections, photorealistic', 'oil painting of a majestic lion in golden savannah light'.

Negative prompt: Recommended: 'ugly, poorly drawn hands, extra fingers, deformed, blurry, bad anatomy, text, watermark'.
